Schema Markup Status

Dentist Schema

Not found

Missing

Essential schema for local businesses. Should be implemented on the homepage and contact page, defining the practice's details, address, contact, opening hours, and price range. Missing all required properties: name, address, telephone, openingHours, priceRange, description, url, image.

Person Schema

Not found

Missing

Crucial for individual doctor profiles (e.g., 'mark-forrest-dmd--601-north-flamingo-road.php'). Should include name, jobTitle, worksFor, and medicalSpecialty. Missing all required properties.

Service Schema

Not found

Missing

Highly recommended for specific service pages (e.g., 'gum-disease.php', 'patient-information.php') to describe treatments offered, including name, description, and provider. Missing all required properties: name, description, provider.

Organization Schema

Not found

Missing

Important for establishing the website's entity. Should be implemented on the homepage, including name, URL, logo, and contact information. Missing all required properties: name, url, logo, contactPoint.

WebSite

Not found

Missing

Fundamental schema for the overall website, often including a potentialAction for sitelinks search box. Should be on the homepage. Missing all required properties: name, url, potentialAction (SearchAction).

GBP Profile Optimization

1. Description

Not Optimized
Current GBP Description:

We hold ourselves to a high standard of excellence. This includes every aspect of our practice, from the dental care we provide to the equipment we use to the health and safety protocols we follow to the incidental services we offer, such as being available to our patients during dental emergencies. Above all, our aim is to provide each of our patients with healthy teeth and gums and beautiful smiles throughout their lives.

Main service keyword + location combination
Secondary services mentioned
Dr. names included
Secondary locations mentioned
Concise and punchy
Add specific services, doctor names, and location. Be more descriptive about expertise.

On-Page SEO Optimization

Comprehensive page-level and homepage element optimization checklist

Page-Level Checklists

Team Page

Needs Improvement
Minimum 100 words per team member
Internal link to "Meet the Doctor" page
Services mentioned or linked within the text
Staff photos present
Alt text includes staff name

Doctor Pages

Slight Improvement

Photo doesn't have alt text & the design should be improved.

Minimum 250–400 words
Credentials listed (DDS, DMD, etc.)
Credentials or affiliations linked
Professional photo with matching alt text
Internal links to relevant services

Privacy Policy

Optimized
Privacy policy page exists

Blog

Missing
Clear title tag and meta description
Key takeaway section present
Author credit present
"Medically reviewed by" or author credit present

Service Pages

Needs Improvement

Patient education pages are currently being used in place of service pages. These can either be reworked to include both educational information about each procedure and clear details about the services provided by Dr. Forest, or kept as-is while creating separate, dedicated service pages for the treatments offered by the practice.

Keyword in headings (H1, H2, H3)
Secondary keywords throughout content
Clear call-to-action (CTA)
Service schema markup present
Optimized meta title and description
Matches commercial intent

Locational Pages

Needs Improvement

We are currently missing dedicated local pages for key nearby cities: Miramar, Hollywood, Davie, and Cooper City. This represents a significant opportunity to expand marketing reach and capture potential patients searching for dental services in these areas.

Location keyword in headings (H1, H2)
Google Map embedded on page
Local images with descriptive alt text
Location-specific call-to-action
Matches commercial intent
